feat.name: Right Where you Want Them
feat.text: Whether with a weapon or your bare hands, you keep your opponents in their place. Increase the maximum distance you can Reposition or Shove an opponent to 10 feet on a success or 15 feet on a critical success.

traits.name: Guardian
traits.text: This trait indicates abilities from the guardian class.
